description: Required GitHub Environment secret names for Singularity production-class deploys. Values are verified on the deploy target by bin/check-deploy-env.sh; this manifest verifies the GitHub environment is populated before a release is attempted.

requiredSecrets.name: DEPLOY_HOST
requiredSecrets.purpose: Remote Docker host or office laptop hostname used by the deploy workflow.

requiredSecrets.name: DEPLOY_USER
requiredSecrets.purpose: SSH user used by the deploy workflow.

requiredSecrets.name: DEPLOY_PATH
requiredSecrets.purpose: Absolute target checkout/deploy path on the remote host.

requiredSecrets.name: DEPLOY_SSH_KEY
requiredSecrets.purpose: Private SSH key for the deploy workflow. Prefer an environment-scoped deploy key.

requiredSecrets.name: APP_ENV
requiredSecrets.purpose: Production-class app environment marker: production, staging, or perf.

requiredSecrets.name: SINGULARITY_ENV
requiredSecrets.purpose: Production-class Singularity environment marker: production, staging, or perf.

requiredSecrets.name: AUTH_OPTIONAL
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be false for production-class deploys.

requiredSecrets.name: AUTH_PROVIDER
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be iam so Workgraph and Platform Web use IAM.

requiredSecrets.name: TENANT_ISOLATION_MODE
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be strict for production-class deploys.

requiredSecrets.name: REQUIRE_TENANT_ID
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be true so Context Fabric rejects unscoped requests.

requiredSecrets.name: DEFAULT_GOVERNANCE_MODE
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be fail_closed so Context Fabric does not default omitted governance_mode requests to fail-open in production-class deployments.

requiredSecrets.name: CF_TOOL_GRANT_ENABLED
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be true so Context Fabric mints per-tool grants for MCP to verify.

requiredSecrets.name: IAM_SERVICE_TOKEN_TENANT_IDS
requiredSecrets.purpose: Comma-separated tenant IDs allowed by auto-minted IAM service tokens.

requiredSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_INTERNAL_TOKEN_TENANT_IDS
requiredSecrets.purpose: Comma-separated tenant IDs allowed by Workgraph internal service-token paths.

requiredSecrets.name: JWT_SECRET
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated 32+ character IAM/JWT signing secret.

requiredSecrets.name: LOCAL_SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated bootstrap/admin password; use reset-bootstrap-password for existing IAM databases.

requiredSecrets.name: CONTEXT_FABRIC_SERVICE_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated service token for Context Fabric internal routes.

requiredSecrets.name: AUDIT_GOV_SERVICE_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated service token for audit-governance ingestion/query proxying.

requiredSecrets.name: AUDIT_GOV_URL
requiredSecrets.purpose: Reachable audit-governance base URL; deploy preflight verifies /health before fail-closed production deploys.

requiredSecrets.name: LEARNING_SERVICE_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated service token for folded learning summary and pattern APIs served by agent-service.

requiredSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_INTERNAL_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated Workgraph internal service token.

requiredSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_INCOMING_EVENT_SECRETS
requiredSecrets.purpose: JSON map of source_service to rotated HMAC secrets required by Workgraph's public incoming event receiver.

requiredSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_PROXY_SERVICE_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Pre-minted IAM service JWT for Platform Web to call Workgraph authenticated routes.

requiredSecrets.name: MCP_BEARER_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated MCP bearer token.

requiredSecrets.name: MCP_DEFAULT_GOVERNANCE_MODE
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be fail_closed so direct MCP invokes and approval resumes do not default omitted governanceMode requests to fail-open in production-class deployments.

requiredSecrets.name: MCP_TOOL_GRANT_MODE
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be enforce so production MCP verifies Context Fabric tool grants before mutating or high-risk tool execution.

requiredSecrets.name: MCP_REQUIRE_EFFECTIVE_CAPABILITIES
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be true so production MCP refuses profile-backed tool dispatches that omit the resolved effective capability set.

requiredSecrets.name: TOOL_GRANT_SIGNING_SECRET
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated 32+ character HMAC key shared by Context Fabric grant minting and MCP grant verification.

requiredSecrets.name: MCP_RUNNER_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.purpose: Rotated sandbox runner token when container command execution is enabled.

requiredSecrets.name: PROVIDER_MANIFEST_SIGNATURE_MODE
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be required for production-class deploys so external provider manifests are signed.

requiredSecrets.name: PROVIDER_MANIFEST_TRUSTED_KEYS
requiredSecrets.purpose: Trusted provider-manifest HMAC keys as JSON or comma-separated keyId:secret pairs; each secret must be 32+ characters.

requiredSecrets.name: PROVIDER_MANIFEST_MAX_TTL_SECONDS
requiredSecrets.purpose: Maximum signed manifest validity window, between 300 seconds and 90 days.

requiredSecrets.name: AGENT_SOURCE_ALLOW_PRIVATE_URLS
requiredSecrets.purpose: Must be false for production-class deploys so provider manifests and URL document sources cannot fetch private, local, or metadata hosts.

optionalSecrets.name: TOOL_SERVER_ENDPOINT_ALLOWLIST
optionalSecrets.purpose: Optional comma-separated URL prefixes for server-side tool invocation targets. Leave unset for internal platform tools only; add exact https provider invocation prefixes when external API skills need invoke permission.

optionalSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_REQUIRED
optionalSecrets.purpose: Defaults to true for production-class deploy preflight. Set false only with WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_ALTERNATE_MODEL and WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_EVIDENCE.

optionalSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_ALTERNATE_MODEL
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required only when WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_REQUIRED=false. Allowed values: schema-per-tenant, database-per-tenant, cluster-per-tenant.

optionalSecrets.name: WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_EVIDENCE
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required only when WORKGRAPH_DB_TENANT_ISOLATION_REQUIRED=false. Ticket, runbook, or architecture reference proving the alternate isolation model is deployed and verified.

optionalSecrets.name: IAM_AUTH_MODE
optionalSecrets.purpose: Set to oidc for external SSO deployments; local is intended for development/bootstrap mode.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_ISSUER_URL
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required with --require-oidc / IAM_AUTH_MODE=oidc; external IdP issuer URL.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_CLIENT_ID
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required with --require-oidc / IAM_AUTH_MODE=oidc; OIDC application client ID.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required with --require-oidc / IAM_AUTH_MODE=oidc; rotated OIDC client secret.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_REDIRECT_URI
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required with --require-oidc / IAM_AUTH_MODE=oidc; callback URL registered with the IdP.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
optionalSecrets.purpose: Optional comma-separated email domains allowed to sign in through OIDC.

optionalSecrets.name: OIDC_ADMIN_EMAILS
optionalSecrets.purpose: Optional comma-separated emails promoted to IAM super-admin when federated through OIDC.

optionalSecrets.name: MCP_GIT_SSH_KEY_HOST_PATH
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required only when MCP_GIT_PUSH_ENABLED=true and MCP_GIT_AUTH_MODE=ssh.

optionalSecrets.name: MCP_GIT_TOKEN_ENV
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required only when MCP_GIT_PUSH_ENABLED=true and MCP_GIT_AUTH_MODE=token.

optionalSecrets.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
optionalSecrets.purpose: Required only when MCP_GIT_AUTH_MODE=token and MCP_GIT_TOKEN_ENV defaults to GITHUB_TOKEN.
